title: Ubiquiti AF60-XG, UISP airFiber 60 XG, price per piece
description: The airFiber 60 XG (AF60 XG) is a 60 GHz point-to-point (PtP) bridge with a built-in, 5 GHz backup radio. The AF60 XG delivers low-interference, low-latency throughput, making it an ideal component for carrier backhaul. It also features integrated GPS and a Bluetooth management radio to simplify setup and configuration Low-interference, 60 GHz spectrum Supported channels: 58320, 59400, 60480, 61560, 62640, 63720, 64800 MHz - support depends on the regulation in the country of use Supported 60 GHz channel bandwidth: 4320, 2160 MHz High-gain dish antenna 5 GHz backup radio 4+ km link range - support depends on the regulation in the country used Throughput up to 3.8 Gbps , with channel bonding up to 6 Gbps Terragraph-certified 10G SFP+ port Integrated GPS Link planning support via ispdesign.ui.com Simple, Bluetooth-powered setup with the UISP® Mobile app Device (feed + radome cover) Parabolic antenna Power PoE adapter 48V / 0.65A Power cord Holder
